title: Meme Dimensions
description: Meme Dimensions is mod that adds new dimensions and mobs based of memes to the game.
body:
(1.0.4 and up versions of mod that run on 1.19.4 are probably the most stable and fixed (i recommend downloading these ones if you are new to the mod for best experience))

How to quickly find Agartha Biome in creative mode:
1. Build a portal from "Plastic Block" blocks
2. Take item called "Ibuprofen"
3. Right click portal with it to activate it (like Nether portal)
4. Go through the portal and type /locate biome stupidmememod:agartha_biome into the chat
5. Click on found coordinates so they show up on chat as a command and press enter

![stupid meme mod image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1943be0e049cec6498b685c6de6a214e0a7f45fb.png)

The mod adds 3 new main dimensions and 2 much smaller and less important. In those 3 new dimensions you can find plenty of new biomes and mobs that you can fight with.

The main focus of the mod is "Cursed Dimnesion" (yeah with word dimension misspelled).

The mod doesn't really change much in base game, just adds some content next to base game. However i tried my best and theres so much content that you can even beat that mod (step by step guide lower below). This mod contains both polish and other of kinds memes. Important: This mod doesn't have as target to hurt or offend anybody. Also just have fun!
1.0.4 is here!

This time with a new dimensions and more mobs as always!

Stupid Meme Mod (Meme dimensions) step by step guide for versions 1.0.2 - 1.0.3 (1.0.4 guide coming soon)):

1. Once you spawn go get atleast 6 Oak Saplings, 3 Oak Logs and 3 Iron (you will need those for later)

2. When you get these saplings, look for "Stupid Biome" in overworld. It would be easy to distinct, look for white grass and yellow water.

3. When you will find that biome wait for night time, then collect atleast:
- 11 "Wicherek", drop from "Helicopter cat",  white flying cats
- 5 "Piwerko", drop from "Twuj Stary", short angry man with beer in his hand
- 5 "Sussy apple", drop from "Amogus"(I'm sorry for among us), among us characters spawning everywhere in night

-5 "Zajepasztet", drop from "Zajepasztet Kid", kid in glasses and orange shirt 

4. Craft 12 "Suspling block" from 6 Oak Saplings and 6 "Sussy apple"

5. Craft 1 "Idiot Sapling" from 1 "Wicherek", 1 "Piwerko", 1 "Susplink block" and 1 Oak Sapling

6. Build a portal (like Nether portal) from 10 remaining "Susplink block" and 4 any blocks for corner and lit it (like with Flint and Steel) with "Idiot Sapling" and enter the portal

7. You are now in New Idiot Dimension (do not care about the old one), your goal here is to find "Stupid Tower", it's a wierd structure made from Stone bricks and other materials

7.1. Feel free to explore for a bit, there are diffrent things worth seeing

8. In caves of "Egg" biome you can find "Sausage Ore", you can smelt it to "Sausage" and make armor and tools from it, they are slightly better than diamond

9. Once you find a "Stupid Tower", get atleast 6 "Sausage" from chests, go to the highest floor and collect "Dragon block"

10. Craft 1 "Skrzynka Piwerek" from 4 "Piwerko", 1 "Sausage", 1 "Dragon block" and 3 Oak Logs

11. The block you crafted is used to summon a boss, "Tfuj Stary Dragon". Place the block down in place you dont mind being destroyed.

11.1. "Tfuj Stary Dragon" is strong. Better prepare yourself with full "Sausage" armor and tools, some food and consider crafting a "Piwerko Gun", crafted with 4 Iron and 1 "Piwerko". The ammo to gun is "Puste piwerko", crafted by putting a "Piwerko" in crafting table

12. Once you defeat "Tfuj Stary Dragon" collect it's drop, "Piwero".

13. It's time to go to "Cursed dimnesion"(Yes it should be misspelled). Get:

-5 "Potato Block", yellow blocks that look like sponge, growing as leaves on "Idiot Biome"

 Craft 10 "Cursed Block" by putting 5 "Potato block", 5 "Sausage" and 5 "Zajepasztet" that you have in crafting in any shape to get them. Craft "Iron Ho(m)er", crafted with 2 Iron and 3 Sticks, just like crafting Iron Pickaxe but switch Sticks and Iron

14. Build a portal from "Cursed Block" blocks and lit it with "Iron Ho(m)er" and enter the portal

15. You are now in Cursed Dimnesion, remember where your portal is! Your goal here is to get:
- 1 "Blender", found in "Infinite Ikea" structure, big blue box
- 9 "Burger block", found in caves everywhere
- 4 "Lasagna", you can get it by smelting 4 "Lasagna block", found in "Lasagna meadow" biome

15.1. Feel free to explore even more, because there's even more to see here

16. Craft 1 "Packed burger", crafted with 9 "Burger" blocks

17. Craft 1 "Fat burger", crafted with 1 "Packed burger" and 4 "Lasagna"

18. Come back to Overworld and find "Your mom plate" block. It's located in a structure made from Stone Bricks with 2 torches, block is just a square white plate

19. Place "Fat burger" on "Your mom plate" to summon another boss, "Your Mom". It's another strong one

20. Once you defeat "Your Mom" collect "Packed fat" that dropped from her

21. Craft 2 "Wicherek block", it's crafted with 4 "Wicherek" forming a cross in crafting table

22. Now you should have all intergents to craft "Boss Blender". It's crafted with 2 "Wicherek block", 1 "Blender", 1 "Packed fat" and 1 "Piwero"

23. You have crafted final boss (for now) summoner. Once you place it it will spawn an island in the sky with the boss on it, "Helikoper". To access the island just walk on "Boss Blender" block, you will be teleported on the island

24. To defeat "Helikopter", you need first to kill 4 "Air producer", they are located in 4 small towers around the "Helicopter". Hitting them will give you levitation effect for short time. Once you kill them all you can damage "Helicopter" now

25. If you deafeted "Helicopter" congrats! You have beaten Stupid Meme Mod! (for now) Feel free explore more for more funny.
